title: Schedule
description: A persisted schedule. Returned by /v1/schedules endpoints.

task.description: Task dict to dispatch when the schedule fires. Shape mirrors a primitive's request body plus {kind: 'complete'|'embed'|'agent', name: str}.

interval_seconds.description: Recurring fire interval. Mutually exclusive with at_iso.

at_iso.description: One-shot trigger time. Mutually exclusive with interval_seconds.

webhook_url.description: Optional callback URL. Each fire enqueues a durable POST with {schedule_id, run_id, result}.
